description_long: This is a modern rectangular bathroom sink with an integrated countertop and a wooden vanity cabinet below. The sink basin is shallow and wide, with smooth, rounded edges and a single faucet mounted at the rear center. The vanity features two large horizontal drawers with sleek metallic handles, providing ample storage space. The wood grain finish of the cabinet contrasts with the matte white surface of the sink, giving it a contemporary look. Plumbing fixtures, including the drain and pipes, are visible inside the cabinet, indicating functional realism. The overall design is minimalist and suitable for urban residential or commercial restrooms.
description: A modern rectangular bathroom sink with a white integrated basin and a wood-finished vanity cabinet featuring two drawers and a single faucet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood grain finish of the cabinet and the depth of the integrated sink and countertop.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two large drawers, the sleek handles, and the centered faucet above the basin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the wood finish and the profile of the sink and cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view with the drawers open, exposing the internal plumbing and storage compartments inside the cabinet.
